title: main.c goto usage is correct but unusual for Zephyr
description: main.c:108-126 uses goto main_loop for error handling. This is valid C but Zephyr style typically uses early returns or nested ifs. The current code is correct - all variables are declared before the gotos (lines 98-101 comment explains why). Consider adding a one-line comment: '// Error handling converges at main_loop' at the first goto to signal intent.
close_reason: Fixed: added block comment explaining the goto cleanup pattern for LoRa L2 initialization
